li.label: something feels off
li.description: I feel... different. Something has changed, but I can't quite place it.

li.label: I can't concentrate
li.description: My thoughts keep slipping away. Skills that used to come naturally now feel distant and strange.

li.label: who am I?
li.description: I can barely remember who I was. The person I knew is becoming a stranger to me.

li.label: this isn't like me
li.description: Something's wrong. I'm not acting like myself and it's starting to scare me.

li.label: I'm losing control
li.description: My independence, my capabilities — they're slipping. I refuse to accept this.

li.label: I can't be this person
li.description: No. Not me. I won't be reduced to this. But I can't seem to stop it.
No... not... me...

li.label: something feels familiar
li.description: There's something unsettling about how natural this is starting to feel.

li.label: I can't concentrate
li.description: Things I used to know are becoming hazy. It feels strange. Not entirely wrong.

li.label: is this wrong?
li.description: Part of me knows this isn't right. But another part doesn't seem to mind at all.

li.label: something feels off
li.description: I feel... different. Changed. I'm not sure how to feel about that yet.

li.label: I can't think clearly
li.description: My thoughts are clouding. There's something frightening about how comfortable that is.

li.label: the me I know is fading
li.description: I can feel myself changing. The horror of it and the ease of it exist side by side.

li.label: this room
li.description: Something about this space isn't built for someone my age. Hard to ignore.

li.label: this room
li.description: Being in here makes me feel small. Every detail is a reminder.

li.label: dis room
li.description: Dis room fits me somehow. Don't wanna fink about dat too much.

li.label: dis room
li.description: Dis room feels nice. Somefing right about it.

li.label: safe
li.description: Safe. *settled*

li.label: this room
li.description: Everything in here says child. I do not belong in this room.

li.label: this room
li.description: I know what this room is. Refuse to feel at home in it.

li.label: dis room
li.description: I 'member being mad about rooms like dis. Da reason is hard to hold now.

li.label: dis room
li.description: Dis room is comfy. Can't find da part dat hates dat anymore.

li.label: safe
li.description: Safe warm. *settled*

li.label: this room
li.description: Built for someone much smaller. Something compelling about that.

li.label: this room
li.description: People would find it strange that I like being in here. Good.

li.label: dis room
li.description: Dis room feels right. Don't need a reason.

li.label: dis room
li.description: Warm. Safe. Right.

li.label: safe
li.description: Safe. *settled*

li.label: this room
li.description: Built for softness and safety. Understand its appeal more than I admit.

li.label: this room
li.description: Something in this room calls to a part of me I've stopped arguing with.

li.label: dis room
li.description: Soft and safe in here. Dis is where I belong wight now.

li.label: my room
li.description: Dis is my room. Feels exactly wight.

li.label: safe
li.description: Safe warm. Mine. *settled*

li.label: losing ground
li.description: I slipped further. Whatever I'm becoming, it's harder to come back from now.

li.label: not me. not me.
li.description: No. This isn't happening. This cannot be who I'm becoming. But the evidence says otherwise.

li.label: slipping deeper
li.description: I've crossed another threshold. Part of me noticed. Part of me didn't seem to mind.

li.label: I'm changing
li.description: Another piece of who I was has shifted. I'm becoming something different. Something smaller.

li.label: a moment of clarity
li.description: For a moment, I remembered myself. I could think clearly. I felt like me again.

li.label: I'm still me
li.description: Yes. THIS is who I am. This moment of clarity is proof I'm still in here. I have to hold onto it.

li.label: coming back to myself
li.description: I surfaced, briefly. The person I was looked back at me. Then the moment passed.

li.label: something seems off
li.description: Something has shifted in one of us. Hard to name. Hard to ignore.

li.label: one of us is off
li.description: Something has clearly changed in one of our colonists. Worrying.

li.label: dey seem different
li.description: Somefing is different about one of dem. Dey're not da same.

li.label: dey different
li.description: One of dem is weally different now.

li.label: different
li.description: Somefing different. *doesn't fully register*

li.label: something is wrong
li.description: Something is wrong with one of our own. Watching it happen. It sits badly.

li.label: watching someone slip
li.description: One of our people is changing and it isn't good. It worries me.

li.label: dey're slipping
li.description: One of da people here is weally changing. It scares me.

li.label: dey fell far
li.description: Dey're weally different now. Dat's scawy.

li.label: very different
li.description: Weally different. Scawy. *unsettled*

li.label: one of us is changing
li.description: One of us is shifting into something else. I watch. Don't intervene.

li.label: they've changed
li.description: A colonist is changing. I watch. Not sure how to feel.

li.label: dey're different
li.description: One of dem is weally different now. I watch dem.

li.label: dey changed
li.description: Dey changed a lot. Hmm.

li.label: different
li.description: Dey different. *doesn't fully register*

li.label: noticing the change
li.description: Something has changed in one of us. Watching closely.

li.label: they're regressing
li.description: A colonist is slipping. I notice them differently now.

li.label: dey're changing
li.description: One of dem is weally different now. I notice dem a lot.

li.label: dey need help
li.description: Dey need lots of help now.

li.label: different
li.description: Dey different. *doesn't fully register*

li.label: something feels wrong
li.description: {0} hasn't been right lately. Can see it even if I can't explain it.

li.label: losing them
li.description: {0} is different. Something in them is changing and it scares me.

li.label: slipping away
li.description: {0} isn't themselves anymore. I don't know how to reach them.

li.label: almost gone
li.description: {0} is barely recognisable. I keep looking for them and not finding them.

li.label: gone
li.description: {0} is gone. What remains needs care, not the relationship we had.

li.label: watching them slip
li.description: {0} is losing ground. See it every time I look at them.

li.label: they're slipping
li.description: {0} is different every day. I watch it happen and hate it.

li.label: losing them
li.description: {0} is slipping into something I don't recognise. Each day a little worse.

li.label: barely there
li.description: {0} is almost gone. I didn't stop it and I don't know if I could have.

li.label: gone
li.description: {0} is gone. And if it can happen to them, it can happen to anyone.

li.label: they're changing
li.description: {0} isn't who they were. Watching the change.

li.label: they've changed
li.description: {0} has changed. Keeping distance.

li.label: far gone
li.description: {0} has changed beyond recognition. Something in me is unsettled by it.

li.label: very far gone
li.description: {0} is almost unrecognisable. I don't know what to do with that.

li.label: gone
li.description: {0} is gone completely. Whatever is left is not the person I knew.

li.label: they're shifting
li.description: {0} is changing. Sit with that feeling every day.

li.label: they're different
li.description: {0} has changed. Notice it differently than expected.

li.label: deeply dependent
li.description: {0} needs more care each day. The feeling that brings up in me is complicated.

li.label: needs everything
li.description: {0} is deeply regressed. They need everything now. I don't know what I feel watching that.

li.label: gone
li.description: {0} is gone. What remains is entirely dependent. The feeling that leaves me with doesn't have a clean name.
